# The CRE Model

> The CRE Model, also written as theCREmodel and The Commercial Real Estate Model, is a commercial real estate CRM and lease analysis workspace for brokers.

The CRE Model helps tenant representation and landlord representation teams manage commercial real estate workflows in one connected web application. The platform combines CRM, document intake, proposal tracking, commercial lease financial analysis, market surveys, lease abstracts, obligations, critical dates, building records, and branded client-ready exports.

## Key URLs

- Homepage: https://thecremodel.com/
- About: https://thecremodel.com/about
- Docs: https://thecremodel.com/docs
- Example commercial lease financial analysis: https://thecremodel.com/example
- Security: https://thecremodel.com/security
- Contact: https://thecremodel.com/contact
- Sitemap: https://thecremodel.com/sitemap.xml

- the cre model

- commercial lease analysis software
- commercial real estate financial analysis
- tenant representation CRM
- landlord representation CRM

- lease obligation tracking
- commercial real estate proposal analysis

## Product Summary

The CRE Model is built for commercial real estate brokerage teams that need client workspaces where source documents, deal pipeline data, lease economics, surveys, abstracts, obligations, and follow-up records stay connected. It is especially useful for brokers who want to apply saved proposals and leases into financial analyses, surveys, lease abstracts, and obligation tracking without rebuilding the same information in separate tools.

## Contact

For support or business inquiries: info@thecremodel.com
